title: Air India AI171 Crash Site to Get Rs 547-Crore Makeover With Hospital, Hostel and Research Centre
description: A year after the Air India AI171 crash killed 260 people in Ahmedabad, the Gujarat government has announced a Rs 547 crore plan to redevelop the destroyed medical campus. The project will build new hospitals, hostels, and a modern laboratory, turning tragedy into a healthcare and education hub.
